name: demand_response
description: a demand-response event world; actions enroll, curtail, settle

card.description: a demand-response event world; actions enroll, curtail, settle

rules: enroll adds curtailable capacity; total enrolled_kw is capped at baseline_kw and is refused once settled.
curtail opens the event and delivers load reduction, never exceeding enrolled_kw; current_load_kw = baseline_kw - delivered_kw.
settle pays incentive_rate per delivered kW minus penalty_rate per kW of shortfall against min(enrolled_kw, target_reduction_kw), then locks the event.
phase advances idle -> enrolled -> event_active -> settled and never moves backward.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name")
    params = action.get("params") or {}

    baseline = s.get("baseline_kw", 100.0)

    if name == "enroll":
        # Register curtailable capacity into the program. Total enrolled
        # capacity is capped at the baseline load (cannot promise to shed
        # more than is actually drawn). Closed once the event is settled.
        if s.get("settled"):
            return s
        kw = float(params.get("kw", 20.0))
        s["enrolled_kw"] = min(baseline, round(s.get("enrolled_kw", 0.0) + kw, 4))
        s["participants"] = s.get("participants", 0) + 1
        if s.get("phase") == "idle":
            s["phase"] = "enrolled"

    elif name == "curtail":
        # Shed load during the event. Delivered curtailment can never exceed
        # enrolled capacity; current load drops by what is delivered.
        if s.get("settled"):
            return s
        s["event_active"] = True
        s["phase"] = "event_active"
        room = max(0.0, round(s.get("enrolled_kw", 0.0) - s.get("delivered_kw", 0.0), 4))
        kw = min(float(params.get("kw", 10.0)), room)
        s["delivered_kw"] = round(s.get("delivered_kw", 0.0) + kw, 4)
        s["current_load_kw"] = round(baseline - s["delivered_kw"], 4)

    elif name == "settle":
        # Close the event and compute the payout. Obligation is the smaller of
        # what was enrolled and the dispatched target. Shortfall is the unmet
        # part of that obligation; payout = incentive*delivered - penalty*short.
        if s.get("settled"):
            return s
        delivered = s.get("delivered_kw", 0.0)
        obligation = min(s.get("enrolled_kw", 0.0), s.get("target_reduction_kw", 0.0))
        shortfall = max(0.0, round(obligation - delivered, 4))
        revenue = s.get("incentive_rate", 0.0) * delivered
        penalty = s.get("penalty_rate", 0.0) * shortfall
        s["shortfall_kw"] = shortfall
        s["settlement"] = round(revenue - penalty, 4)
        s["settled"] = True
        s["event_active"] = False
        s["phase"] = "settled"

    return s

emit.report: DR event [{phase}]: {participants} enrolled for {enrolled_kw} kW, delivered {delivered_kw} kW vs target {target_reduction_kw} kW (shortfall {shortfall_kw} kW) -> settlement ${settlement}
